programme.title: Quo Vadis TV
programme.desc: Quo Vadis TV is committed to sharing the Biblical message in a way that makes Christian living practical, realistic, and attainable. Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

programme.desc: Marine Sgt. John Stryker (John Wayne) is despised by his own men for his rough attitude and exhausting training regimen. programme.title: Crush With Lee & Tiffany
programme.desc: "Crush With Lee & Tiffany" stars outdoor enthusiasts Lee and Tiffany Lakosky, a husband/wife team whose partnership begins in the home and extends to the woods of eastern Iowa and beyond. They love to bowhunt, and when they are not in New Mexico tracking elk or in North Carolina chasing turkeys -- among other travels -- they fulfill their passion for the sport on their Iowa farm, where they practice a strict land-management program for world-class white-tailed deer. "Let them go, let them grow," is a phrase the couple favors, but when the time comes to cull the herd, Lee and Tiffany demonstrate an uncanny ability to get the job done.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob enters Gary in a race; SpongeBob adopts a worm; SpongeBob and Patrick watch Sandy's pet; Gary follows Patrick; Squidward is coated in mud and leaves; SpongeBob gives Gary a makeover; SpongeBob gets Gary a pet; Patrick watches Gary.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob watches Mr. Krabs' house while he's away and takes extreme measures to make sure no one breaks in; Squidward is forced to room with Patrick.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton creates a clone of himself and Mr. Krabs, but neither restaurant is safe from the newcomer; Squidward gleefully switches jobs with a bus driver for an easy ride, until SpongeBob and Patrick climb aboard.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick are sent to jail in the underground tunnels of Glove World, leading to a daring escape.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward's house becomes infested with a mail-order flea circus meant for SpongeBob; Squidward fakes being sick to get out of work, but his agony only begins when SpongeBob arrives to care for him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Two familiar faces from SpongeBob's past visit; Plankton finds an unlikely ally in the sewers.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and his pals journey to the North Pole to give Santa a present.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mrs. Puff's new substitute teacher gives SpongeBob a crash course in driving; Mr. Krabs and Plankton must work together after discovering a well of miracle-grease under their restaurants.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Frustrated that he's seen as cute instead of evil, Plankton builds a robot to punish anyone who says "aww!"; Patrick crushes the mailman, so he and SpongeBob deliver the mail around Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick exchange tiny living versions of themselves; Plankton tells his grandma that he owns the Krusty Krab, but must keep the lie going when she comes to visit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton tells Patrick he's his conscience so he can convince the wooden-headed star to steal him a Krabby Patty; when Mr. Krabs puts in an open kitchen, SpongeBob gets stage fright and has to invent a new persona.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Squidward try to sell Krabby Patties from a food truck in the darkest depths of the ocean; Pearl and Narlene have a whales' day out in the big city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick's favorite comedy duo has a falling out on live television.

programme.title: Sing 2
programme.desc: Buster Moon and his friends must persuade reclusive rock star Clay Calloway to join them for the opening of a new show.

programme.title: Trolls World Tour
programme.desc: Poppy and Branch discover that there are six different troll tribes scattered over six different lands. Each tribe is also devoted to six different kinds of music -- funk, country, techno, classical, pop and rock. When rockers Queen Barb and King Thrash set out to destroy the other music, Poppy and Branch embark on a daring mission to unite the trolls and save the diverse melodies from becoming extinct.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey accidentally informs a cast member (Susan Sarandon) that she will be fired so that his character will get her character's brain.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler fondly reminisce about London until a startling revelation leaves Chandler floored.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean
programme.desc: Judge Mablean Ephriam, who presided over "Divorce Court" from 1999-2006 as the first star of the revived version of the show, returns to the courtroom genre with his half-hour series that deals with life and the law. programme.desc: Americans just can't get enough courtroom drama, as is evidenced by yet another addition into the daytime court show fray. programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett
programme.desc: Judge Glenda Hatchett presided over her self-titled courtroom show from 2000-2008. Now, she returns to the medium with "The Verdict." In the half-hour series, the Atlanta native and former juvenile-court judge rules over small-claims cases brought in front of her. Hatchett's courtroom isn't just about finding someone guilty, though. She also uses her experience dealing with young people and her tough-love approach to help send a message to out-of-control juvenile offenders to try to set them on the right track in their lives.

programme.title: Supreme Justice With Judge Karen
programme.desc: Karen Mills was a county court judge and criminal defense attorney in Florida before turning to TV to preside over her own court shows. In her third effort, "Supreme Justice," Mills tackles small-claims court arbitrations in her compassionate way, to which viewers of her previous shows have grown accustomed. As usual with court shows, cases involve friendships gone bad, money disputes and property damage.

programme.title: Supreme Justice With Judge Karen
programme.desc: Karen Mills was a county court judge and criminal defense attorney in Florida before turning to TV to preside over her own court shows. In her third effort, "Supreme Justice," Mills tackles small-claims court arbitrations in her compassionate way, to which viewers of her previous shows have grown accustomed. As usual with court shows, cases involve friendships gone bad, money disputes and property damage.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean
programme.desc: Judge Mablean Ephriam, who presided over "Divorce Court" from 1999-2006 as the first star of the revived version of the show, returns to the courtroom genre with his half-hour series that deals with life and the law. The former Los Angeles-based prosecutor takes on the typical cases that are found on TV court shows. The arbitrator says that her show "will be life because everything we do, it involves the law."

programme.title: The Earth Unlocked
programme.desc: They are Earth's most visible formations, but secrets lie unseen beneath these massive mountains waiting to be unlocked.

programme.title: The Earth Unlocked
programme.desc: Pressure is the invisible force that drives weather; pressing down on Earth, it is the difference between a gentle breeze and a monster storm; learning how and why air can turn deadly.

programme.title: Deadman's Curse
programme.desc: Reports of a jar of gold send Adam and Kru on the trail of missing prospector Volcanic Brown and his last known location; Don and Taylor investigate a strange marking on the prospector tools found in the Upper Pitt.

programme.title: Deadman's Curse
programme.desc: Clues revealed in Katzie First Nation history lead the team north; Kru unearths 100-year-old court documents that shed light on Slumach himself.

programme.title: Deadline to Disaster
programme.desc: Unseasonably warm weather in Canada triggers six tornadoes in a matter of hours; an EF3 beast tears through a strip mall terrorizing a teenager and his mother who is impaled by flying glass; another tornado cuts a path of destruction through Ottawa.

programme.title: Deadline to Disaster
programme.desc: Memorial Day weekend 2018, almost 10 inches of rain in two hours sends a monster wave of water through downtown Ellicott City, Md.; it traps tourists and business owners, sweeps vehicles away and collapses buildings.

programme.title: Deadline to Disaster
programme.desc: Category 5 Dorian becomes the strongest hurricane to hit the Bahamas; as storm surge pours into his home, a family wades through chest-deep water in a quest to find higher ground; locals on jet skis rescue neighbors from flooded homes.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401
programme.desc: A storm sweeps across the province, sending heavy rescue crews scrambling; in Hamilton, Kevin fights to clear a wreck in time for the plows to get through.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401
programme.desc: The pressure is on for Steve when a flipped truck blocks access to the airport; Coxon fights a wreck with a toxic payload; a wild rollover rips a cab off its chassis and leaves a trail of destruction for the Ross crew.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401
programme.desc: A heavy wreck and a frustrating recovery threaten to overwhelm Kevin; after a big change in his career, Sonny struggles to make a mark when a heavy load flips in the middle of the city.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: As the deadliest wildfire in Californian history tears across the state, one man battles the flames in a bid to save his home; a tornado tears apart a woman's home in Arkansas; in Uruguay, a helicopter rescue team tries to reach a trapped canoeist.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: A deadly volcanic eruption in Guatemala unleashes a searing hot mass of ash, lava and toxic fumes; an Arkansas woman traveling home is terrorized by a powerful tornado; in the U.K., a routine training exercise becomes a daring rescue mission.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: Hurricane Sandy whips up wild waves in the Atlantic, prompting a rescue mission by the U.S. Coast Guard; cavers in California get caught out by flash floods; wild winds cause a crash for hot air balloonists; residents narrowly escape a landslide.

programme.title: Tornado Alley
programme.desc: A supercell develops into an EF-4 tornado that carves a destructive path through Henryville, Ind.

programme.title: Tornado Alley
programme.desc: An EF-4 multiple-vortex tornado rips through the heart of Tuscaloosa, Ala., leaving a path of destruction 80 miles long and clocking 190-mile-per-hour winds.

programme.title: Tornado Alley
programme.desc: On November 17, 2013 an EF4 tornado struck the town of Washington, Illinois as part of a deadly tornado outbreak across the mid-west.

programme.title: Weekend Recharge
programme.desc: Though it has "weekend" in the title, this show discusses the week ahead in addition to offering suggestions for what to do on Saturday and Sunday. Weather Channel meteorologists go beyond the elements outside and into the realm of lifestyle tips. Each host has a recurring segment on "Weekend Recharge," which includes helping parents get a fresh start to each day and explaining how the weather is expected to impact the weekend's scheduled sports action.

programme.title: Heroes & Survivors
programme.desc: College sweethearts trapped on a mountain; freakish storm turns a sailing regatta into a deadly duel with nature on the high seas.

programme.title: Heroes & Survivors

programme.desc: When you mix the speed of 1,000 horsepower machines with unmatched style, raw unfiltered sound, exceptional driving precision and lots of tire smoke, you get the spectacle of Formula Drift.

programme.desc: The ultimate high-speed test of rider and machine, competitors race for a minimum of 8 or as many as 24 hours at some of the world's most challenging circuits including Le Mans, Spa and Suzuka.

programme.title: My Classic Car
programme.desc: Host Dennis Gage upholds his "honor the timeless classics" catchphrase in this series, as he travels across North America to visit prestigious auto shows and events, spotlighting everything from muscle cars to museum pieces. programme.title: Anzio
programme.desc: After Allied forces invade Anzio, seven Americans become trapped behind German lines and must take shelter with a family.

programme.title: The Dirty Dozen
programme.desc: A U.S. Army major selects and trains 12 hard-core criminals for a daring raid on an impregnable Nazi château.

programme.title: The Longest Day
programme.desc: In 1944, the U.S. Army and Allied forces send a huge force to invade Normandy. With much effort and loss of life, the troops make it off the beach and travel deep into French territory.

programme.title: Hellcats of the Navy
programme.desc: Captain Casey Abbott (Ronald Reagan) commands an American submarine in the Pacific during World War II. When a perilous mission to retrieve a new Japanese mine for study goes awry, he's forced to abandon a likable combat diver, Wes Barton (Harry Lauter). Abbott's orders to leave a man behind appear to be justified, but his second in command, Don Landon (Arthur Franz), believes he had ulterior motives: Barton had been competing for the attention of his love interest, Helen (Nancy Davis).

programme.title: Now, Voyager
programme.desc: Boston heiress Charlotte Vale (Bette Davis) is a neurotic mess, largely because of her domineering mother (Gladys Cooper). But after a stint in a sanatorium where she receives the attention of Dr. Asquith (Claude Rains), Charlotte comes out of her shell and elects to go on a cruise. Aboard ship, she meets Jerry (Paul Henreid) and falls in love, despite his being married. They enjoy a brief tryst in Rio before returning to the States, where Charlotte struggles to forget him and find happiness.

programme.title: I Remember Mama
programme.desc: Norwegian immigrant Marta Hanson (Irene Dunne) keeps a firm but loving hand on her household of four children, a devoted husband (Philip Dorn) and a highly-educated lodger (Cedric Hardwicke) who reads Charles Dickens to the family every evening. Through financial crises, illnesses and the small triumphs of everyday life, Marta maintains her optimism and sense of humor, traits she passes on to her aspiring-author daughter, Katrin (Barbara Bel Geddes).

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: When Earp sends a crooked gambler packing, three saloon owners decide they've had enough and hire gunmen to take Earp out.

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sir Eustace Brackenstall's wife tells Holmes she saw a gang murder her savage husband.

programme.title: Paid Programming -- Great Healthworks -- Ken and Con
Three Desperate Men
programme.desc: Three ex-lawmen Texas brothers become outlaws when one is framed for robbery and murder.

programme.title: Ministry - Your Words Have Power with Joyce Meyer
programme.desc: Your words hold incredible power; today, Joyce reveals how the things you say can impact your life in profound ways.

programme.title: Word of God Ministries
programme.desc: Pastor James McMenis and his wife Chrissy are dedicated to winning the lost to Jesus and making disciples of the saved. Their goal is to bring clarity to the Word of God, making it life-applicable to people everywhere.

programme.title: The Catholic Mass
programme.desc: The Heart of the nation Sunday mass brings the beauty and traditions of the Catholic faith.

programme.title: Perry Stone
programme.desc: Religious teachings from Perry Stone.

programme.title: 2026 Proof Silver Eagle: America's 250th Anniversary Release
programme.desc: Join Mike Mezack for a historic release, the first-ever 1776-2026 dual-date Proof Silver Eagle with Liberty Bell privy mark, struck in .999 silver for America's 250th Anniversary; a one-year-only issue collectors won't want to miss.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp stops a lynching and forces a trial instead, which leads to a surprise for the jury.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp is called in to rescue a pair of Indians being held hostage by a renegade who's been selling guns to members of various tribes.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: The endearing saga of the March sisters -- Meg (Frances Dee), Jo (Katharine Hepburn), Amy and Beth -- who come of age in New England during the Civil War, is based on the classic Louisa May Alcott novel. With Mr. March away fighting for the Union cause, the girls and their beloved mother, Marmee (Spring Byington), manage to keep their spirits up through dire economic and emotional crises, until Jo's literary aspirations and Meg's romance with a teacher threaten to pull the sisters apart.

programme.title: Now, Voyager
programme.desc: Boston heiress Charlotte Vale (Bette Davis) is a neurotic mess, largely because of her domineering mother (Gladys Cooper). But after a stint in a sanatorium where she receives the attention of Dr. Asquith (Claude Rains), Charlotte comes out of her shell and elects to go on a cruise. Aboard ship, she meets Jerry (Paul Henreid) and falls in love, despite his being married. They enjoy a brief tryst in Rio before returning to the States, where Charlotte struggles to forget him and find happiness.

programme.title: I Remember Mama
programme.desc: Norwegian immigrant Marta Hanson (Irene Dunne) keeps a firm but loving hand on her household of four children, a devoted husband (Philip Dorn) and a highly-educated lodger (Cedric Hardwicke) who reads Charles Dickens to the family every evening. Through financial crises, illnesses and the small triumphs of everyday life, Marta maintains her optimism and sense of humor, traits she passes on to her aspiring-author daughter, Katrin (Barbara Bel Geddes).

programme.title: The Bridges at Toko-Ri
programme.desc: Naval Reservist pilot Lt. Harry Brubaker (William Holden) is stationed on an aircraft carrier in the Sea of Japan during the Korean War. Although suffering from battle fatigue and longing to return to civilian life with his wife, Nancy (Grace Kelly), he agrees to fly a dangerous bombing mission over North Korea, with the support of his faithful rescue crew, Forney (Mickey Rooney) and Gamidge (Earl Holliman), and his sympathetic commanding officer, Commander Lee (Charles McGraw).

programme.title: Stalag 17
programme.desc: One night in 1944 in a German POW camp housing American airmen, two prisoners try to escape the compound and are quickly discovered and shot dead. Among the remaining men, suspicion grows that one of their own is a spy for the Germans. All eyes fall on Sgt. Sefton who everybody knows frequently makes exchanges with German guards for small luxuries. To protect himself from a mob of his enraged fellow inmates, Sgt. Sefton resolves to find the true traitor within their midst.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: The endearing saga of the March sisters -- Meg (Frances Dee), Jo (Katharine Hepburn), Amy and Beth -- who come of age in New England during the Civil War, is based on the classic Louisa May Alcott novel. With Mr. March away fighting for the Union cause, the girls and their beloved mother, Marmee (Spring Byington), manage to keep their spirits up through dire economic and emotional crises, until Jo's literary aspirations and Meg's romance with a teacher threaten to pull the sisters apart.

programme.title: Blazing the Western Trail
programme.desc: Noble cowboy the Durango Kid (Charles Starrett) gets snared in a vicious feud between two warring stagecoach operations. One of the two has been recently willed to spitfire Mary Halliday (Carole Mathews), whose father the Kid suspects was murdered by a business rival. With the help of his trusted friends Tex Harding (Tex Harding) and Cannonball (Dub Taylor), the Kid hopes to uncover the truth while hiding the investigation from the strident Miss Halliday.

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A businessman disappears after his wife catches sight of him in an opium den.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Black Dakotas
programme.desc: A Confederate plot to turn the Sioux against the Union crumbles when a double agent makes off with a shipment of gold.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Murdock to call for Earp's badge when it appears that a crooked gambler got a saloon license by bribing the marshal.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp closes down an all-girl show when the underpaid women begin stealing from the audience, earning Earp the ire of the show's owner, who plots revenge.

programme.title: Home in San Antone
programme.desc: An innkeeper tries to keep his struggling establishment afloat, unaware that a famous country singer (Roy Acuff) and diamond thieves are staying under his roof.

programme.title: The Fighting Marshal
programme.desc: Tim Benton (Tim McCoy) escapes from prison and takes over a marshal's identity to bring the men who framed him for murder to justice.

programme.title: Major Dundee
programme.desc: During the end of the Civil War, Major Dundee guards Confederate prisoners, Union deserters and ordinary hard-bitten criminals in a remote fort. When Apaches attack the fort and make off with three children, Dundee must set up a posse including Confederates, who face a choice between joining up or being shot. The feud between Dundee and Tyreen is also heated up by a sultry Mexican widow.

programme.title: Operation Pacific
programme.desc: A U.S. submarine commander (John Wayne) alienates his crew and ex-wife (Patricia Neal), then takes on the Japanese fleet.

programme.title: Hell Is for Heroes
programme.desc: Exhausted GIs (Steve McQueen, Bobby Darin, Fess Parker) are ordered to hold part of the Siegfried line guarded by a pillbox.

programme.title: The Guns of Navarone
programme.desc: Allied commandos (Gregory Peck, David Niven, Anthony Quinn) try to knock out a Nazi fortress over the Aegean.

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The seemingly meaningless destruction of six busts of Napoleon intrigues Holmes.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Outlaw Stallion
programme.desc: A boy and his mother are kidnapped by outlaws after the boy's stallion kills the outlaw leader's mount.

programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Someone is targeting big winners from the Keno House as they leave town, and Earp is determined to put a stop to it.

programme.title: Paid Programming: Carshield -- Cars Have Changed
The Guns of Navarone

programme.title: Operation Pacific
programme.desc: A U.S. submarine commander (John Wayne) alienates his crew and ex-wife (Patricia Neal), then takes on the Japanese fleet.

programme.title: Major Dundee
programme.desc: A Union major (Charlton Heston) chases Indians to Mexico with a condemned Confederate captain (Richard Harris) and a cavalry of prisoners.

programme.title: Masterson of Kansas
programme.desc: In the 1870s, Marshal Wyatt Earp (Bruce Cowling) calls upon Dodge City, Kan., Sheriff Bat Masterson (George Montgomery) to track down rancher Merrick (John Maxwell), who is accused of murder. But, thanks to some proof held by local Native American Chief Yellow Hawk (Jay Silverheels), Masterson realizes Merrick might be the victim of a frame-up. So, with the help of Earp and gunfighter Doc Holliday (James Griffith), Masterson sets out to find those who are really behind the killing.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Set in the Libyan desert in 1942 where a group of American soldiers become isolated in their tank during the retreat to El Alamein. As they drive across the desert they pick up a group of Allied stragglers, but with their supplies of fuel, food and water running low, they try to reach a desert fortress, but a large German detachment is also heading there.

programme.title: The Story of Dr. Wassell
programme.desc: This film presents a dramatization of the wartime heroics of naval doctor Corydon M. Wassell (Gary Cooper), who is stationed in the East Indies during a Japanese attack on the USS Marblehead. After the less seriously wounded soldiers are evacuated to Australia, Wassell stays in Java to save those left behind. As the Japanese advance, he risks his life and defies orders in an attempt to rescue as many as possible. His actions are later recognized in a radio address given by President Roosevelt.

programme.title: Lawless Range
programme.desc: Rodeo man John Middleton (John Wayne) is called upon for a favor by Hank Mason (Wally Howe), a friend of the Middletons who lives in a nearby town. But, when John arrives at Hank's, the man's niece, Ann (Sheila Mannors), informs him that Hank has been abducted. John then teams up with the local sheriff, takes on a disguise and begins investigating cattle rustlers who could be connected to the disappearance. He's led to a corrupt banker (Frank McGlynn Jr.), who has plans to take over the town.

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Mary Morstan has received a pearl in the post every year since her father's disappearance; when she is summoned to meet her mysterious benefactor, Holmes and Watson accompany her, leading to the truth about a secret pact.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Cisco Kid Returns
programme.desc: Pancho and the Kid attempt to prove that they did not kidnap the child they are protecting from a killer.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: An angry ex-gang member who hates Earp tries to take advantage of a visiting Englishman, but finds himself facing off against both men.

programme.title: Paid Programming: Carshield -- Cars Have Changed
The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp arrests the Kansas Kid, accused of robbery, murder, and wounding a deputy, but Earp is not convinced of the man's guilt or the sheriff's intentions.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Set in the Libyan desert in 1942 where a group of American soldiers become isolated in their tank during the retreat to El Alamein. As they drive across the desert they pick up a group of Allied stragglers, but with their supplies of fuel, food and water running low, they try to reach a desert fortress, but a large German detachment is also heading there.

programme.title: The Story of Dr. Wassell

Wassell (Gary Cooper), who is stationed in the East Indies during a Japanese attack on the USS Marblehead. After the less seriously wounded soldiers are evacuated to Australia, Wassell stays in Java to save those left behind. As the Japanese advance, he risks his life and defies orders in an attempt to rescue as many as possible. His actions are later recognized in a radio address given by President Roosevelt.

programme.title: Flying Leathernecks
programme.desc: As the new commanding officer of a squadron of Marine pilots, Maj. Daniel Kirby (John Wayne), a stern and strict leader, cannot believe the lack of discipline exhibited by the soldiers. As the men resist Kirby's harsh adherence to orders, Capt. Carl Griffin (Robert Ryan) leads their cause for a more relaxed environment. But by pushing his men beyond their limits, Kirby slowly transforms them into battle-ready warriors, forcing all of them to make sacrifices along the way.

programme.title: Masterson of Kansas
programme.desc: In the 1870s, Marshal Wyatt Earp (Bruce Cowling) calls upon Dodge City, Kan., Sheriff Bat Masterson (George Montgomery) to track down rancher Merrick (John Maxwell), who is accused of murder. But, thanks to some proof held by local Native American Chief Yellow Hawk (Jay Silverheels), Masterson realizes Merrick might be the victim of a frame-up. So, with the help of Earp and gunfighter Doc Holliday (James Griffith), Masterson sets out to find those who are really behind the killing.

programme.title: Al Jennings of Oklahoma
programme.desc: Lawyer Al (Dan Duryea) and brother Frank (Dick Foran) turn to robbing banks and trains after Union troops raid their home.

programme.title: The Fighting Seabees
programme.desc: A morale-boosting tribute to the US Navy's Construction Battalions who followed behind the troops invading Pacific islands held by the Japanese to build runways, roads and bridges. Wedge Donovan is the civilian head of a construction company approached by the Navy to train their men as specialists. Instead, the impetuous Donovan wants to prove his crew are up to the job, but they are shot up by the Japanese.

programme.title: Flying Leathernecks
programme.desc: As the new commanding officer of a squadron of Marine pilots, Maj. programme.title: Anzio

programme.title: The Carson City Kid
programme.desc: The Carson City Kid (Roy Rogers) stops stagecoaches traveling between Wild West mining towns, searching their mail sacks for letters addressed to Morgan Reynolds, the man who killed his brother. Discovering that Reynolds operates a saloon under the name Lee Jessup (Bob Steele), the Kid takes a job as the saloon's bouncer. While vying with Reynolds for the affections of singer Joby Madison (Pauline Moore), the Kid discovers a swindled miner (Noah Beery Jr.) who claims to be the Carson City Kid.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: S01 E19 Bulldog A city slicker (Fisher Stevens) arrives in Sweetwater and tries to model himself after Hickok (Josh Brolin). With Ty Miller and Anthony Zerbe.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: S01 E20 Matched Pair A former teacher instigates a potentially deadly confrontation between Hickok and a "friendly" adversary.

programme.title: The Proud Rebel
programme.desc: An Illinois widow (Olivia de Havilland) helps a Southern widower (Alan Ladd) traveling with his dog and mute son after the Civil War.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S01 E19 The Gunmen Little Joe and Hoss are mistaken for gunmen while in a small Texas town; they find themselves in the middle of a dangerous feud between two families.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S01 E20 The Fear Merchants A potential mayoral candidate attempts to stir up trouble between majority and minority groups in town.

programme.title: The Concrete Cowboys
programme.desc: Two Montana cowboys (Jerry Reed, Tom Selleck) head for Nashville and help a woman (Morgan Fairchild) find her sister.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S01 E01 The Prizefighter When Jim Bridger's second-in-command begins enforcing camp discipline with brutal violence, one trapper pushes back, and a showdown seems inevitable.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S01 E10 A Shard of Glass Haunted by the memory of leaving a man to die, mountain man Jim Bridger is determined not to repeat the mistake; when his trapping party runs out of water while crossing a barren desert, Bridger struggles desperately to keep his companions alive.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S05 E05 Marshal Garfias Faces the Mob As a deputy in Phoenix, Enrique Garfias witnesses the lynching of prisoners by vigilantes; when he is later elected as the town's first marshal, he has a chance at redemption when he attempts to defend a gang of criminals from yet another angry mob.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S05 E06 Cattle Annie and Little Britches After a chance encounter with a charismatic outlaw, two teenage girls decide to run away from their harsh and humdrum lives to join Bill Doolin's gang; they soon discover that being outlaws isn't nearly as glamorous as they thought it would be.

programme.title: Sitting Bull
programme.desc: President Grant helps a cavalry major (Dale Robertson) condemned for helping Dakota Chief Sitting Bull (J. Carrol Naish).

programme.desc: A white man (Dennis Hopper) stands trial for killing a Mexican in 1848 California, just after the Mexican War.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S04 E02 New Sheriff in Town The cowboys take on one last job before committing to a lucrative long-term deal with a local rancher; Bubba makes plans for Andie's financial future; Booger and Jaclyn celebrate Matthew's birthday; Cody befriends a young boy with autism.

programme.desc: S01 E30 Three-Legged Terror A young man wants an education despite his uncle's objection.

programme.desc: Divided by the Civil War, two brothers (Ronald Reagan, Bruce Bennett) reunite against Apaches in Arizona.

programme.desc: S02 E11 The Trail Gang An outlaw joins the Cartwrights' cattle drive, knowing it will take him to the town where his father is the sheriff.

programme.desc: S03 E03 Seven A prison wagon carrying seven criminals stops over in North Fork for supplies.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S04 E01 Big Deal The cowboys consider investing in a million-dollar cattle deal; Booger's family struggles with Jaclyn's overwhelming work schedule; Cody and Misty teach kids about the cattle industry; Bubba teaches his father-in-law about the cowboy way of life.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S04 E02 New Sheriff in Town The cowboys take on one last job before committing to a lucrative long-term deal with a local rancher; Bubba makes plans for Andie's financial future; Booger and Jaclyn celebrate Matthew's birthday; Cody befriends a young boy with autism.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E30 Three-Legged Terror A young man wants an education despite his uncle's objection.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.desc: Divided by the Civil War, two brothers (Ronald Reagan, Bruce Bennett) reunite against Apaches in Arizona.

programme.title: Kansas Pacific
programme.desc: Southern sympathizers block an Army engineer (Sterling Hayden) building a railway to the West in 1860.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S05 E09 The Most Amazing Man A dapper little braggart invites challenge with tales of his gunfighting prowess.

programme.desc: S03 E04 Burton Mossman Crosses the Line After failing to capture ruthless murderer Augustine Chacon on U.S. soil, Arizona Ranger Burton Mossman relinquishes his badge to cross the border; in Mexico, he goes under cover as a horse thief to join Chacon's gang and spring his trap.
